output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant because same-tenant duplicate refreshes should coalesce, but different tenants must continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A single global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing_retry_session: billing uses a global mutex for a different reason, because its provider serializes all tenants","markdown_parser_session: onboarding docs and quickstart cache issues are unrelated to auth refresh queuing"]}
